title: Monday.com agency set-up
excerpt:
We’re a global PR and marketing agency (25 people) currently looking for help with monday.com better set-up and integration. About 50% of our staff are actively using it, while the other half are still on the fence. 
Loo…

posts.author: wiesia.kuczaj (wiesia)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re a global PR and marketing agency (25 people) currently looking for help with monday.com better set-up and integration. About 50% of our staff are actively using it, while the other half are still on the fence.

Looking for an experienced Monday.com expert to help us:

  • Optimise our current setup
  • Build out templates
  • Streamline workflows
  • Create a structure that works across teams
  • Help Drive adoption and onboard the rest of the team

If you’ve helped agencies like ours with similar transitions, we’d love to hear from you!

Thanks. Wiesia

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @wiesia.kuczaj

Welcome to the community!

We would love to help. We specialise in helping teams like yours get the most out of monday.com through optimised setup, streamlined workflows, and high-impact adoption strategies.

We’ve worked with teams in PR, marketing, and other fast-paced, creative industries, so we understand the need for a flexible but structured monday.com environment that actually gets used by everyone. Our approach is hands-on: we don’t just build boards, we co-design a system that works for your team’s real-world habits and goals, and we stick around to support onboarding and ongoing adoption.

We’d be happy to learn more about your current setup and goals, and offer some ideas. Feel free to DM me here or email us via teameasy@easy-mondays.com

Looking forward to connecting!

Kind regards,
Peta

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wiesia,

I’d love to help! I lead a monday.com Platinum Partner team recently named Services Partner of the Year in LATAM. We’ve supported several agencies like yours to optimize setups, streamline workflows, and boost adoption across teams.

Happy to chat and see how we can support your goals — feel free to email us at info@cinapsys.com

Regards

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @wiesia.kuczaj

I’ll build out custom templates tailored to your agency’s needs, ensuring that teams across departments (PR, marketing, etc.) have structures that work seamlessly for them.

I’ll also focus on improving the current workflows, eliminating any redundancy, and integrating any tools you’re already using, such as Slack or Google Workspace, to keep everything in sync.

To drive adoption, I’ll provide onboarding support, set up training sessions, and create clear documentation to make it easy for the rest of your team to get on board and feel confident using monday.com.

Please feel free to Contacts us

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: diya.deligence (Diya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wiesia,

We understand the challenges that come with scaling and standardizing tools like Monday across a growing team. We’ve helped teams like yours optimize setups, design cross-team templates, and streamline workflows to drive adoption and make Monday a true operational backbone — not just a task list.

We’d be glad to review your current setup, understand your team dynamics, and collaborate on a structure that fits your agency’s needs. Could you share:
Any key pain points or blockers you’re seeing in your current usage?
Your priority teams or workflows to focus on first?

Let’s connect and explore how we can help!

— Diya Mangla
sale at deligence dot com

posts.author: ZoeArnold (Zoe)
posts.cookedHtml:
wiesia:

e’re a global PR and marketing agency (25 people) currently looking for help with monday better set-up and integration. About 50% of our staff are actively using it, while the other half are still on the fence.

Looking for an experienced Monday.com expert to help us:

  • Optimise our current setup
  • Build out templates
  • Streamline workflows
  • Create a structure that works across teams
  • Help Drive adoption and onboard the rest of the team

If you’ve helped agencies like ours with similar transitions, we’d love to hear from you!

Thanks. Wiesia

Thanks in advance!

Hi Wiesia

This sounds right up our alley!

I’m Zoe from Kick Consulting. We’re a certified monday.com partner who’ve helped dozens of creative and PR agencies just like yours get the most out of their setup. From optimising boards and building scalable templates, to streamlining cross-team workflows and turning hesitant users into confident champions, we’ve seen (and solved) it all.

We know that adoption is just as important as structure, so our approach always includes practical onboarding and change management tips tailored to your team.

To get things started, we offer a complimentary 1-hour strategy session where we’ll review your current workspace and give you actionable insights (no strings attached). If there’s a good fit, we can then scope a tailored roadmap based on your priorities.

Feel free to email me: zoe@kickconsulting.com.au.

Looking forward to hearing more about your goals!

Cheers,
Zoe | Kick Consulting
monday.com Partner

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wiesia,

I’ve set monday up from scratch for marketing and PR agencies specifically, as well as help imbed and develop existing solutions into larger organisations. I would be happy to help either, as a service or just giving some free advice/direction

I’m an authorised monday partner as well as a monday ambassador.

Feel free to DM me if you’d like to talk more.
